author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for SSE, WebSocket, and Streamable-HTTP MCP transports (CC supports 8 transport types — stdio/sse/sse-ide/ws/ws-ide/http/sdk/claudeai-proxy). OC has only stdio + plain HTTP. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires SseTransport + WebSocketTransport + StreamableHTTPClientTransport implementations conforming to MCP 2025-03-26 transport spec. Multi-day protocol work; blocks connecting to any cloud-hosted MCP server. Parent audit #523.
